message:
Fix AuthKey zero-seed and H2 test stream ID parity

- key.rs: Remap seed=0 to fixed non-zero constant (0x9e3779b97f4a7c15) to
  prevent xorshift RNG from locking into zero-state, ensuring distinct keys
  for all seeds; add test verifying seed 0 and 1 produce different keys
- h2_security.rs: Correct stream IDs from odd (1,3,5,7) to even (2,4,6,8)
  in StreamStore tests - even IDs are client-initiated per HTTP/2 spec,
  aligning tests with actual protocol semantics

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
